scripts.test: pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:site && pnpm test:github
scripts.test:github: CMS_AUTH_URL=https://cms-auth.example.workers.dev GITHUB_ACTIONS=true astro build && vitest run tests/github-output.test.ts
scripts.test:unit: vitest run tests/cms-config.test.ts tests/content-schema.test.ts tests/posts.test.ts tests/topics.test.ts tests/urls.test.ts
